creator: daniel@netwalk.org
text:
I approve. We've been in contact, and I asked for him to submit this since I
don't have access to FreeBSD atm.

On Tue, Sep 22, 2009 at 2:39 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of news/sabnzbdplus,
>
> Please note that PR ports/138976 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/138976
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
